description: Negative modifier badges that hinder the player during clinical encounters. Displayed as red/orange worn-looking ovals on the badge reel UI.

trigger_rules.description: Burnout badges are triggered mid-encounter by poor performance. One badge is drawn randomly from the pool when a trigger fires.

triggers.description: Reaching 5 harm points triggers a random burnout badge.
Dropping to 50 AP or below triggers a random burnout badge.

early_game.note: If a burnout badge is already active when a second trigger fires, nothing happens.

late_game.note: Unlocked through progression. Both triggers can now each fire independently, allowing up to 2 burnout badges in one encounter.

pre_attached.description: Some encounters on the selection screen come with a burnout badge pre-attached. The badge is visible before the player chooses the encounter. Harder encounters with pre-attached badges offer higher XP rewards.

badges.name: Burnt Out Resident
badges.flavor_text: Third overnight this week. Everything takes longer.

badges.name: Understaffed
badges.flavor_text: Radiology is slammed. Hope you're not in a hurry.

badges.name: Difficult Stick
badges.description: IV access must be established before any IV medication can be ordered.
badges.flavor_text: No veins. None. The nurses have tried three times.

badges.name: Poor Historian
badges.description: History questions cost double AP. Answers are vague and incomplete.

badges.name: Lab Machine Down
badges.description: One random lab category is unavailable this encounter.
badges.flavor_text: The analyzer is showing an error code nobody recognizes.

badges.name: Allergy Surprise
badges.description: One undisclosed allergy is revealed mid-encounter after a medication is ordered.
badges.flavor_text: It's in the old chart. The one from 2009. Nobody checked.

badges.name: Beliefs on File
badges.description: No blood products can be administered this encounter.
badges.flavor_text: It's documented. It's valid. Plan accordingly.

badges.name: Language Barrier
badges.description: All history questions cost +1 AP. Interpreter is on the way.

badges.name: Family in the Room
badges.description: Physical exam costs +1 AP. Certain exam findings require extra sensitivity flags.
badges.flavor_text: There are seven of them. They all have questions.

badges.name: EHR Down
badges.description: Diagnosis action costs +5 AP. Records are unavailable.
badges.flavor_text: The system is down for maintenance. Scheduled. On a Tuesday afternoon.

badges.name: Scanner's Booked
badges.description: CT and MRI unavailable this encounter. X-ray and ultrasound only.
badges.flavor_text: The CT is down until 6pm. Sorry.

badges.name: Polypharmacy
badges.description: Patient is on 8 unknown home medications. Interaction risk is elevated.
badges.flavor_text: Brought in a grocery bag of pill bottles. None of them are labeled.
